title: Review: SpaceRole enum, contact_set/space_set atomicity fixes
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the single live risk is the hardcoded role list in the validate_member_patch error message (nie-xora.1), which will silently diverge from SpaceRole when a new role is added. All other fixes are correct and well-tested.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: the three-state Option<Option<&str>> threading for description/display_name, and the contact_set empty-patch path using a non-transactional get_contacts read (safe because contacts are permanent, but the invariant is implicit). Would raise confidence if: there were a test for contact_set with blocked=Some(current_value) to verify it correctly returns updated on a no-op write, and a test verifying no intermediate state is visible during a two-field patch (though the single-bump test is a strong proxy).
